subject: Docs Audit: Broken Links, Missing Images & Orphaned Pages
body:
## Documentation Audit —SquadDash `docs/`

> Scope: all49Markdown files under `docs/`. No files were modified.

---

## Summary

The documentation tree is structurally complete and well-organised, but has four recurring problem classes: **4 broken internal links**, **54 missing image files** (every single image reference in the docs is dead — both image directories are empty), **1 accuracy issue** (wrong GitHub repo URL in the installer page), and **5 orphaned pages** that exist on disk but are unreachable from any other doc.

---

## 1. Broken Internal Links

| Severity | File | Link as written | Should be |
|---|---|---|---|
| ❌ Error | `getting-started/README.md` (line 42) | `visual-studio-external-tool.md` | `VS Tooling.md` |
| ❌ Error | `features/README.md` (line 17) | `../panels/loop-panel.md` | `../panels/Loop.md` |
| ❌ Error | `features/README.md` (line 19) | `../panels/tasks-panel.md` | `../panels/Tasks.md` |
| ❌ Error | `panels/Approvals.md` (line 118) | `loop-panel.md` | `Loop.md` |

---

## 2. Accuracy Issues

| Severity | File | Issue|
|---|---|---|
| ⚠️ Warning | `getting-started/Stand-alone Installer.md` (lines 29, 103) | GitHub Releases URL reads `https://github.com/bradygaster/SquadDash/releases` — the actual public repo is `MillerMark/squad-dash`. This will send users to the wrong (or nonexistent) page. |
| ℹ️ Info | `README.md` (Stack section) | States `.NET 10` — confirmed against `global.json` (`sdk:10.0.200-preview`), so this is accurate. No change needed. |

---

## 3. Missing Images (54 of54)

Both `docs/images/` and `docs/screenshots/` directories exist but are **completely empty**. Every image referenced in the documentation is missing.

**Affected files (20+):**

| File | Missing image count |
|---|---|
| `getting-started/Stand-alone Installer.md` | 4 |
| `getting-started/VS Tooling.md` | (likely; large file) |
| `options/general.md` | ~1 |
| `options/speech.md` | ~1 |
| `options/remote-access.md` | ~1 |
| `options/custom-model.md` | ~1 |
| `options/notifications.md` | ~1 |
| `options/sounds.md` | ~1 |
| `options/ai.md` | ~1 |
| `reference/slash-commands.md` | 1 (`slash-command-autocomplete.png`) |
| `reference/loop-file-templates.md` | 1 (`loop-settings-options-ui.png`) |
| `reference/loop-file-custom-ui.md` | 5 (bool/enum/group/text/full-example) |
| `reference/remote-control/setup-local.md` | 1 (`rc-qr-code-transcript.png`) |
| `reference/remote-control/setup-ngrok.md` | 1 (`rc-preferences-tunnel.png`) |
| `panels/Loop.md` | 1 (`loop-settings-options-ui.png`) |
| `panels/Maintenance.md` | 2 (`maintenance-panel.png`, `maintenance-hover-popup.png`) |
| `panels/Inbox.md` | 2 (`inbox-panel.png`, `inbox-message-window.png`) |
| `panels/Approvals.md` | 1 (`descriptive-filename.png` — likely a placeholder name) |
| `customization/Tinting and Themes.md` | (tinting screenshots) |

> **Note:** `panels/Approvals.md` references `images/descriptive-filename.png` which looks like an unfilled placeholder filename, not just a missing file.

---

## 4. Broken External Links

Live HTTP checks were not performed. However, one external URL is flagged as almost certainly wrong based on accuracy review:

| Severity | File | URL | Issue |
|---|---|---|---|
| ⚠️ Warning | `getting-started/Stand-alone Installer.md` | `https://github.com/bradygaster/SquadDash/releases` | Points to `bradygaster/SquadDash` — repo is `MillerMark/squad-dash` |

Remaining11 external links (ngrok, Cloudflare, ntfy, ollama, dotnet, etc.) appear to be valid official URLs and were not flagged.

---

## 5. Orphaned Pages (no inbound links)

These files exist on disk but are not linked from any other Markdown file in the docs tree, and do not appear in `SUMMARY.md`.

| Severity | File | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| ℹ️ Info | `features/inbox.md` | Separate from `panels/Inbox.md` which IS in SUMMARY. May be a duplicate draft or a forgotten early version. |
| ℹ️ Info | `loop-files/loop-fix-tagged-tasks.md` | Entire `loop-files/` subdirectory is absent from SUMMARY and unreferenced. |
| ℹ️ Info | `decisions/screenshot-metadata-schema.md` | ADR-style doc; no inbound links. May be intentionally internal. |
| ℹ️ Info | `decisions/replay-ui-action-architecture.md` | ADR-style doc; no inbound links. May be intentionally internal. |
| ℹ️ Info | `screenshots/README.md` | Entire `screenshots/` subdirectory unreferenced from docs nav. |

---

## 6. No `published: false` Issues

No files contain `published: false` front-matter. All discoverable pages are active. `getting-started/Stand-alone Installer.md` does carry `nav_exclude: true, search_exclude: true` but is still reachable via `SUMMARY.md` — this appears intentional.

---

## Issue Count Summary

| Type | Count | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| Broken internal links | 4 | ❌ Error |
| Wrong GitHub URL | 1 | ⚠️ Warning |
| Missing image files | 54 | ❌ Error |
| Orphaned pages | 5 | ℹ️ Info |
| `published: false` link targets | 0 | — |

actions.label: Fix broken links
actions.prompt:
Please fix 4 broken internal links in the SquadDash docs (D:\Drive\Source\SquadDash-public\docs\). Do not change any other content.

1. In `docs/getting-started/README.md` (line 42): Change `visual-studio-external-tool.md` to `VS Tooling.md`. The link text is 'Visual Studio - External Tool'.

2. In `docs/features/README.md` (line 17): Change `../panels/loop-panel.md` to `../panels/Loop.md`. The link text is 'Loop Panel'.

3. In `docs/features/README.md` (line 19): Change `../panels/tasks-panel.md` to `../panels/Tasks.md`. The link text is 'Tasks Panel'.

4. In `docs/panels/Approvals.md` (line 118): Change `loop-panel.md` to `Loop.md`. The link text is 'Loop Panel'.

Also fix the wrong GitHub URL in `docs/getting-started/Stand-alone Installer.md` (lines 29 and 103): Change `https://github.com/bradygaster/SquadDash/releases` to `https://github.com/MillerMark/squad-dash/releases`. The actual repo is MillerMark/squad-dash.

Commit the changes with a clear message describing what was fixed.
actions.hint: Fixes 4 broken internal links and 1 wrong GitHub URL in the docs

actions.label: Dismiss
actions.hint: Acknowledge — no action will be taken
